title: Exhibit in Boston’s startup ecosystem at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026
author: TechCrunch Events
fullText:
On June 9, over 1,000 founders, investors, and decision-makers will gather for TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. This isn’t just foot traffic. It’s a full day of concentrated deal flow.

An exhibit table turns that energy into measurable growth. You don’t need more awareness. You need customers, capital, and strategic partners.

Secure your exhibit table and put your startup at the center of the startup universe.

Image Credits:Halo Creative

Why exhibiting drives real growth

Direct access to buyers: The Expo Hall is where founders and operators actively source tools and partners. Capture leads instantly through the event app and start building your pipeline on the spot.

Where handshakes replace cold pitches: Move from cold outreach to face-to-face conversations. With access to roundtables, breakouts, and curated networking, your team can turn visibility into velocity.

Credibility that compounds: Your startup is featured across the Founder Summit website, app, sponsor directory, announcements, and closing ceremony — reinforcing trust with customers and investors alike.

Multi-channel ROI: Lead-gen tools, sponsor listings, and team-wide passes mean you’re not just exhibiting. You’re executing across sales, marketing, and fundraising at the same time.

 
 Techcrunch event
 
 
 Boston, MA
 |
 June 9, 2026
 
 
 
 

Deploy your team strategically: With five total passes, you can split focus across sales, partnerships, hiring, and curated meetings to maximize every hour onsite.

What’s included in the TC Founder Summit exhibitor package

Dedicated 6′ x 3′ exhibit space with a 6-foot table, 2 chairs, and table linen

Branded tabletop sign (11” x 14”) featuring your sponsor logo

Lead-generation tools to capture meaningful leads

5 event tickets for your team or guests

Company logo featured in the sponsor section of the TC Founder Summit event page

Company profile listed in the event app for added visibility

On-site signage across the venue

Complimentary access to partner Wi-Fi for seamless networking

First come, first served — book now

Spots are limited and first come, first served. If you’re ready to turn three days into months of pipeline, reserve your exhibit table now before your competitor does.
summary: On June 9, over 1,000 founders, investors, and decision-makers will gather for TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. This isn’t just foot traffic. It’s a full day of concentrated deal flow.
